chunks.text: Search Arena: Analyzing Search-Augmented Large Language Models (EECS-2025-177) Patrick Wu, Jiayi Pan, Xinyan Hu, Wei-Lin Chiang, Anastasios Angelopoulos, Trevor Darrell, Narges Norouzi and Joseph Gonzalez
chunks.question: What is the title and authors of the report EECS-2025-177?
chunks.answer: Search Arena: Analyzing Search-Augmented Large Language Models by multiple authors.

chunks.text: Forecasting and Control of Peak Power at EV Charging Stations (EECS-2025-135) Samuel Bobick
chunks.question: What is the title and author of the report EECS-2025-135?
chunks.answer: Forecasting and Control of Peak Power at EV Charging Stations by Samuel Bobick.
